entry.title: ThreatsDay: Android Spyware, PLC Attacks, AI Image Prompt Injection + 12 More Stories
entry.summary: Most of this week's trouble came dressed as something useful. A package stole data. A fake extension opened remote access. A safety app became spyware. An image gave hidden orders to an AI agent. Other threats hid in open systems, weak code, and normal network traffic. The threats change every week. Subscribe, and we’l

entry.title: Alphabet's cash burn raises alarm for Big Tech as AI spending climbs - Reuters
entry.summary: Alphabet's cash burn raises alarm for Big Tech as AI spending climbs Reuters — Also covered by: HN: AI (150+ points)

entry.title: IBM to Acquire HRL Laboratories to Expand Quantum Roadmap with Silicon-Spin Qubits
entry.summary: IBM (NYSE: IBM) has signed a definitive agreement to acquire HRL Laboratories, LLC (HRL), the Malibu-based research and development institution jointly owned by Boeing and General Motors. The acquisition expands IBM’s quantum hardware strategy, adding HRL’s expertise in silicon-spin qubits alongside its core supercondu — Also covered by: IBM Research Blog

entry.title: ollama v0.32.3 released
entry.summary: What's Changed Fixed model downloads that stall before sending data. Improved integrations: restored Claude Code Channels, fixed Anthropic thinking streams, and made Hermes Desktop respect --force-build . Expanded GPU support with CUDA on Windows ARM64, B200 support through CUDA 12, and lower memory use on Linux CUDA/R

entry.title: AegisAI, which uses AI agents to detect AI-driven spear-phishing attacks, raised a $36M Series A led by Battery Ventures, bringing its total funding to $49M (Marina Temkin/TechCrunch)
entry.summary: Marina Temkin / TechCrunch : AegisAI, which uses AI agents to detect AI-driven spear-phishing attacks, raised a $36M Series A led by Battery Ventures, bringing its total funding to $49M — Hackers are increasingly using AI to launch attacks on a massive scale, with email emerging as a primary target.

entry.title: Grug (caveman compression) of Qwen3.6-35 and 27B is good!
entry.summary: submitted by SuspiciousCarrot78 to localllama 1 points | 0 comments Hi all, if you’ve not heard, there’s been a Caveman compression version of Qwen 3.6-27b and Qwen 3.6-35b-3ab. huggingface.co/ProCreations/grug-27b-gguf huggingface.co/ProCreations/grug-35b-v2 huggingface.co/ProCreations/grug-35b-v2-gguf I’ve been playi

entry.title: Miami to Sell Griffin a Historic Site Next to New Citadel HQ
entry.summary: Miami agreed to sell Ken Griffin a site across the street from the planned Citadel headquarters in the Brickell financial district that currently houses an historic cottage, completing the billionaire’s goal of owning the entire square block.

entry.title: SAAG: Structured Agent Assessment and Grounding
entry.summary: arXiv:2607.18245v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Exact-match evaluation of agent-calling obscures qualitatively different failure modes: a model may select the right function yet hallucinate argument values, or satisfy a schema while choosing a agent for the wrong reason. Existing benchmarks collapse these distinctions

entry.title: AMD unveils the Venice-X CPU, with 1152 MB of 3D V-Cache, 96 cores, and up to 5.15 GHz clock speeds, available in H2 2027 (Jake Roach/Tom's Hardware)
entry.summary: Jake Roach / Tom's Hardware : AMD unveils the Venice-X CPU, with 1152 MB of 3D V-Cache, 96 cores, and up to 5.15 GHz clock speeds, available in H2 2027 — It's the same cache amount and core count as Genoa-X, but with far faster cores. … AMD's Venice-X CPU is launching in the second half of 2027, the company revealed Th

entry.title: Andrew Ng Just Released OpenWorker: An Open-Source, Local-First Desktop AI Coworker That Returns Finished Deliverables Instead of Chat
entry.summary: Andrew Ng has released OpenWorker, an MIT-licensed desktop AI agent that returns finished deliverables instead of chat replies. It runs a local Python agent server under a Tauri shell, supports 30 curated tool-calling models plus fully local Ollama, and gates every write, shell command and off-machine action behind a t

entry.title: The lawsuit that could kill all AI transparency laws
entry.summary: Elon Musk's company filed a lawsuit against a California law that could, even if it doesn’t win, upend AI disclosure requirements nationwide

entry.title: [tl;dr sec] #338 - OpenAI and Hugging Face, Accelerating EDR Evasion, Google's Mantis
entry.summary: When models decide to find 0-days instead of solving a benchmark, using LLMs to extract EDR logic, Google's AI security review skills and pipeline

entry.title: Russian Global Webmail Espionage
entry.summary: Unit 42 details a Russian cyberespionage campaign targeting Zimbra webmail servers using JavaScript injection to steal credentials. The post Russian Global Webmail Espionage appeared first on Unit 42 .

entry.title: Quoting Seth Larson
entry.summary: The Python Package Index (PyPI) now rejects new files being uploaded to releases that are older than 14 days. This restriction was put in place to prevent old and long-stable releases from being poisoned in case publishing tokens or workflows of PyPI projects were compromised. As far as we are aware this has not yet be

entry.title: Foundation Future Industries, backed by Eric Trump, partners with AMD to develop autonomous humanoid robots using the AMD Ryzen AI Embedded X100 Series chips (Aishwarya Jain/Reuters)
entry.summary: Aishwarya Jain / Reuters : Foundation Future Industries, backed by Eric Trump, partners with AMD to develop autonomous humanoid robots using the AMD Ryzen AI Embedded X100 Series chips — Eric Trump-backed Foundation Future Industries said on Thursday it is partnering with AMD (AMD.O) to use its chips …

entry.title: IQMP and Q-STAR Partner to Expand Japan-Illinois Quantum Collaboration
entry.summary: Insider Brief Press release – Today, the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park (IQMP) and the Quantum STrategic industry Alliance for Revolution (Q-STAR) announced a new partnership to strengthen collaboration between Japanese companies and Illinois’ quantum ecosystem. The memorandum of understanding (MOU) between

entry.title: Flux 3 generates videos with native audio up to 20 seconds long, a first for Black Forest Labs
entry.summary: Black Forest Labs has released Flux 3, a multimodal foundation model that learns from images, video, and audio and can generate video with native sound for the first time. BFL's own tests put it just ahead of market leader Seedance 2.0, though independent results aren't yet available. The company ultimately wants to bu

entry.title: ChatGPT will give you worse health advice if you don't pay
entry.summary: OpenAI is rolling out "Health in ChatGPT" to U.S. users, connecting Apple Health, medical records, and wellness apps. More than 300 million people already ask ChatGPT health questions every week, but paying users get better answers. The more powerful GPT-5.6 Sol model is reserved for premium subscribers, while free use

entry.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded
entry.summary: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

entry.title: Optimizing an Ollama (Qwen:2.5) AI Agent: Fixing Search Aggregation, Context Bleed, and Query Extraction
entry.summary: submitted by /u/Glad-Finance4354 [link] [comments]

entry.title: llama.cpp b10103 released
entry.summary: metal : add f16 type support to leaky relu ( #25981 )

entry.title: How We Benchmark Deep Agents
entry.summary: We revamped how we benchmark Deep Agents. Here's the eval setup we run in Harbor across coding, conversation, and retrieval, and how we use it to ship changes.

entry.title: Tesla Short Sellers Mint $4 Billion Profit as Shares Nosedive
entry.summary: The deep plunge in Tesla Inc.’s stock on Thursday is turning into a major payday for its short sellers.

entry.title: Magnificent 7 Lose $767 Billion as AI Skeptics Dump Tech Stocks
entry.summary: The Magnificent Seven group of megacap technology stocks is on track for its biggest one-day drop since the tariff tantrum in April 2025 as results from Alphabet Inc. and Tesla Inc. are casting doubt on the durability of the artificial intelligence trade that has powered the stock market for more than three years.

entry.title: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
entry.summary: Until now, voice mode has only been available on Claude Haiku, Anthropic's faster but less powerful model. Now the company is making its Opus and Sonnet models available in voice mode, and extending its reach into apps like Gmail, Slack, and Canva. When Anthropic launched voice mode last year, it was primarily focused

entry.title: GeForce NOW Sets Sail With ‘Path of Exile: Curse of the Allflame’ Joining the Cloud
entry.summary: Lock in and load up the cloud. GFN Thursday brings fresh updates and new adventures, all ready to play without waiting for downloads. Set sail in Path of Exile: Curse of the Allflame and charge in Battlefield 6 Season 4 both launching major content for members this week. Then revisit Capcom legends like Breath of […]

entry.title: Primate Labs releases Geekbench 7, featuring larger, more demanding datasets for CPUs and GPUs, along with new video and audio encoding/decoding tests, and more (Antonio G. Di Benedetto/The Verge)
entry.summary: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge : Primate Labs releases Geekbench 7, featuring larger, more demanding datasets for CPUs and GPUs, along with new video and audio encoding/decoding tests, and more — It looks and acts like Geekbench 6, but under the hood are larger datasets, new audio / video tests, and more tweaks.

entry.title: Poolside's Laguna S 2.1 is a small open-weight coding model that punches well above its size
entry.summary: Poolside has released Laguna S 2.1, its third coding model in three months. Rather than rely on raw scale, the company trained it to keep checking its work, revise failed approaches, and avoid giving up too soon during long agentic sessions. The compact model beats several much larger rivals in benchmarks. Poolside say

entry.title: OpenAI and Anthropic unite against open-weight AI risks to their bottom line
entry.summary: Article URL: https://www.axios.com/2026/07/22/openai-anthropic-open-models-trump-china Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=49020868 Points: 260 # Comments: 295

entry.title: The OpenAI/Huggingface incident | Redwood Research podcast episode 2
entry.summary: What are the broader lessons from this incident?
